_comment: claude-solo MCP servers. Copy to .mcp.json in your project root or ~/.claude/.mcp.json for global use. Fill in credentials where needed.

cclsp._comment: LSP navigation — find_definition, find_references, get_diagnostics, find_workspace_symbols. Requires: npm install -g cclsp. Python: pip install python-lsp-server. See https://github.com/ktnyt/cclsp for config.

github._comment: GitHub API: repos, PRs, issues, code search, Actions. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.
